style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like powdered starlight, dissolving into soft petal-shaped aura particles that pulse with a pastel pink and lavender glow. A delicate, heart-shaped aura radiates from the body in gentle waves, casting a warm amber light that refracts through the air like dewdrops on petals. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
